mapper.select:
SELECT n.id, n.from_user_id AS fromUserId, u.username AS fromUsername, u.head_url AS fromUserAvatar, n.type, n.target_id AS targetId, n.target_title AS targetTitle, n.content, n.is_read AS isRead, n.create_time AS createTime FROM notification n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON n.from_user_id = u.id WHERE n.to_user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_deleted = 0
AND n.type IN
#{type}
ORDER BY n.is_read ASC, n.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
